text: Welcome to Purestat — where your stats come clean.
Creating your account faster than you can say GDPR.
Time to set up shop. Every empire needs a name.
Drop your domain, we'll handle the rest. No cookies, no drama.
One script tag. That's it. Your site just lost 72KB of baggage.
Let's fast-forward... traffic is rolling in.
Show me the money! Well, the stats. Same thing.
Who's visiting? Where from? We know. Anonymously, of course.
Set a goal. Track conversions. Celebrate responsibly.
Sharing is caring. Invite your team, no extra cookies required.
Freemium to start, scale when ready. Your wallet stays happy.
Purestat. Pure, clean, honest stats. Period.
